metadata.description: 의사결정·커뮤니케이션·학문 프레임워크 6종 묶음. 경영전략(47) + 심리상담(14) + 양육교육(16) + 소통협상(20+) + 제약이론(TOC) + 혁신이론(TRIZ). 한국 맥락 내장, 한영 문서 제공.

plugins.name: strategy-frameworks
plugins.description: Strategic Thinking Agent — meta-router for 47 business strategy frameworks (Porter Five Forces, Drucker MBO, BSC, Blue Ocean, Wardley Mapping, BCG Matrix, BMC, Lean Startup, OKR, Disruptive Innovation, Scenario Planning, etc.). Invoke /think to auto-select optimal frameworks for any business problem.

plugins.name: counsel-frameworks
plugins.description: Psychological Framework Learning Tool — meta-router for 14 counseling frameworks (CBT, ACT, SFBT, MI, IFS, Narrative Therapy, MBSR, MBCT, PPT, REBT, Gottman, DBT Skills, Worden's Grief, PCT). For self-reflection and learning only, NOT a replacement for professional therapy. Invoke /counsel.

plugins.name: parenting-frameworks
plugins.description: Parenting & Education Framework Guide — meta-router for 16 frameworks (Positive Discipline, PET, CPS, Emotion Coaching, Triple P, Attachment Parenting, SDT, Montessori, DAP, UDL, UbD, PBL, Retrieval Practice, Growth Mindset, Formative Assessment, Differentiated Instruction). Invoke /parenting.

plugins.name: howtotalk
plugins.description: Meta Communication Agent — routes among 20+ communication frameworks (NVC, Getting to Yes, Never Split the Difference, Radical Candor, Crucial Conversations, Difficult Conversations, Active Listening, DESC, Influence, SCARF, Socratic Method, Storytelling, etc.). Invoke /howtotalk.

plugins.name: triz-agents
plugins.description: TRIZ — Systematic Innovation and Inventive Problem Solving toolkit (40 Inventive Principles, Contradiction Matrix, Ideal Final Result, Substance-Field Analysis, ARIZ algorithm, Evolution Laws, Trimming, Resources). For engineering contradictions and breakthrough innovation.

plugins.name: toc-agents
plugins.description: Theory of Constraints Thinking Processes — full analysis pipeline and individual tools (Current Reality Tree, Evaporating Cloud, Future Reality Tree, Prerequisite Tree, Transition Tree, Five Focusing Steps, Drum-Buffer-Rope, Throughput Accounting, CCPM, Layers of Resistance).
